# sentinel-ai-connect

> Zero-config decentralized VPN for AI agents. One function call to private internet access through 900+ P2P nodes in 90+ countries. No accounts, no servers, no API keys. Install, fund wallet, connect.

## Quick Start (3 lines)

```javascript
import { connect, disconnect } from 'sentinel-ai-connect';
const vpn = await connect({ mnemonic: process.env.MNEMONIC });
await disconnect();
```

## CLI (1 command)

```bash
npx sentinel-ai connect
```

## Installation

```bash
npm install sentinel-ai-connect sentinel-dvpn-sdk
```

## API (20 exports)

### Connection
- `connect(opts)` — Connect to dVPN. Returns { sessionId, protocol, ip, nodeAddress, country, socksPort, balance, cost, timing }
- `disconnect()` — End session, tear down tunnel
- `status()` — Get connection status { connected, sessionId, protocol, nodeAddress, uptime }
- `isVpnActive()` — Quick boolean check
- `verify()` — Confirm tunnel works { connected, ip, verified, latency }
- `onEvent(callback)` — Subscribe to lifecycle events. Returns unsubscribe function.

### Setup
- `setup()` — Detect environment { os, admin, v2ray, wireguard, preflight }
- `getEnvironment()` — Get OS/binary info without preflight

### Wallet
- `createWallet()` — Generate new BIP39 wallet { address, mnemonic }
- `importWallet(mnemonic)` — Import existing wallet { address }
- `getBalance(mnemonic)` — Query chain balance { p2p, udvpn, formatted, sufficient }

### Discovery
- `discoverNodes(opts)` — Find available nodes { nodes, count, countries }
- `getNodeInfo(address)` — Get node details { moniker, country, protocol, peers, bandwidth }
- `getNetworkStats()` — Network overview { totalNodes, countries, avgPrice }

### Intelligence
- `recommend(opts)` — AI decision engine { recommended, alternatives, reasoning }
- `estimateCost(opts)` — Cost estimate { perGb, perHour, estimatedTotal, currency }

### Errors
- `AiPathError` — Typed error class with .code, .nextAction, .details, .toJSON()
- `AiPathErrorCodes` — 22 error code constants

## Connect Options

```typescript
interface ConnectOptions {
  mnemonic: string;          // Required: BIP39 phrase
  country?: string;          // Preferred exit country
  nodeAddress?: string;      // Specific node
  protocol?: 'v2ray' | 'wireguard' | 'auto';
  gigabytes?: number;        // Default: 1
  dns?: 'handshake' | 'google' | 'cloudflare';
  fullTunnel?: boolean;      // Default: true (route ALL traffic)
  killSwitch?: boolean;      // Default: false
  maxAttempts?: number;      // Default: 3 (nodes to try)
  timeout?: number;          // Default: 120000ms
  silent?: boolean;          // Default: false (suppress step logs)
  onProgress?: (step, detail) => void;
}
```

## Error Handling

```javascript
import { connect, AiPathError, AiPathErrorCodes } from 'sentinel-ai-connect';
try {
  await connect({ mnemonic });
} catch (err) {
  if (err instanceof AiPathError) {
    console.log(err.code);       // 'INSUFFICIENT_BALANCE'
    console.log(err.nextAction); // 'fund_wallet'
    console.log(err.details);    // { address, balance, minimum }
  }
}
```

## Requirements

- Node.js >= 20
- WireGuard: requires admin/root privileges
- V2Ray: no admin needed, auto-installed via `setup()`
- Funded wallet: ~1 P2P minimum (~$0.001 USD)
